name: Flexpak
description_short: Flexpak operates as a check cashing and financial services provider based in Woods Cross, Utah, offering account management and transaction services through their e-commerce platform.
description_long: Flexpak is a financial services company headquartered in Woods Cross, Utah, with two physical locations in the area. The company operates an e-commerce platform that allows customers to manage accounts online and access various financial services. Based on available website content, Flexpak appears to function primarily as a check cashing or cash access service provider, though the website provides limited detail about specific product offerings. The company maintains standard business hours (Monday-Friday, 8 AM-5 PM) and provides customer support via phone and email. Flexpak is currently categorized as a payday alternative, though the website content does not explicitly confirm compliance with payday-alternative lending standards (sub-36% APR). The company's e-commerce platform includes shopping cart and account login functionality, suggesting they offer multiple services beyond basic check cashing. However, the website's 'About Us' page content was not fully captured in the available data, limiting detailed insight into their service portfolio and company mission. Customer service appears accessible through multiple channels including phone (801-956-0696), fax, and email (accounting@flexpak.net). The company is powered by Inform e-Commerce, a third-party platform provider. Without comprehensive product information, it is difficult to assess whether Flexpak qualifies as a true payday alternative lender or functions more as a general check cashing and money services business.
pros: Multiple convenient locations in Woods Cross, Utah area for in-person service
Extended customer support available during business hours (8 AM-5 PM weekdays)
Multi-channel contact options including phone, fax, and email
Online account access and management through e-commerce platform
Established business with consistent operating hours
Clear physical address and verifiable business location information
cons: Website provides minimal information about specific services, products, or pricing
Categorization as 'payday-alternative' cannot be verified from available website content
Limited transparency regarding APR, fees, or loan terms
No clear indication of regulatory compliance or licensing information
Website contact form and navigation suggest incomplete or outdated web presence
best_for: Customers in the Woods Cross, Utah area needing local check cashing services
Individuals with existing Flexpak accounts seeking customer support
Consumers looking for in-person financial transaction services in northern Utah
diagnosis: Flexpak appears to be a regional check cashing and financial services provider serving the Woods Cross, Utah area, though the website content does not adequately document their full service offerings or confirm payday-alternative lending status. The significant lack of detailed product information, pricing, and regulatory compliance details on their website makes independent verification of their business model and categorization difficult.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
